title: Restrict Item Name Edit
excerpt: Please would you add the ability to restrict the editing of the Item Name. I want users to be able to edit information within an item but not to rename it - this would damage the integrity of my data.

posts.author: oakleymartin (Martin Oakley)
posts.cookedHtml: Please would you add the ability to restrict the editing of the Item Name. I want users to be able to edit information within an item but not to rename it - this would damage the integrity of my data.

posts.author: GoldNetAU (Shaun Morgan)
posts.cookedHtml: yes please! this is the same issue we are facing.

posts.author: stone.kane (Stone Kane)
posts.cookedHtml: We have the same request. It’s strange that we can lock all columns but the item name.

posts.author: Janine1435 (Janine)
posts.cookedHtml: The ability to lock the subitem name would be of great use, as currently we are experiencing the problem every day of users changing subitem names.

posts.author: florianblau (Florian   Knoblich)
posts.cookedHtml: Same here, would like to restrict changing of ITEMNAME as well as SUBITEMNAME
